description: Traffic police officers are not following proper protocol at Farmgate intersection. Vehicles going in the wrong direction are being let through without any action, causing accidents.
responseNote: Case assigned to Internal Affairs Unit. Investigation in progress.

description: Traffic signals at Motijheel are broken for the past 2 weeks. Despite multiple complaints to local police post, no repair action has been taken. This is causing major traffic jams every morning.
responseNote: Signal repaired on April 12, 2026 by DMP Technical Unit. CCTV installed for monitoring.

description: Illegal parking enforcement is being selectively applied. Vehicles parked outside a specific restaurant near Gulshan-1 are never ticketed despite clear no-parking signs.
Water supply to our area (Rayer Bazar, Block C) has been disrupted for 5 days. WASA officials have not responded to calls. This is a serious health emergency for 3,000 families.
responseNote: Emergency repair team deployed. Main pipe valve failure fixed. Supply restored on April 6th.

description: Water supplied to our area (Dhanmondi Road 27) has a very bad smell and appears discoloured. We are afraid it is unsafe for drinking. Please investigate and fix.
responseNote: Water quality team deployed for sampling on April 10. Lab results expected within 72 hours.
